title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kumarakom Lake Resort - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kumarakom Lake Resort - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Kumarakom Lake Resort are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort:
Kumarakom Lake Resort is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
